ABOUT

Early days, from Mandan, North Dakota.

TevunahAi is in its infancy stages. It is from Mandan, North Dakota of all places. We are just getting going. The Quantized models are the beginning. We have every intention to continue to bring highly quantized models to the masses for free as the industry moves forward. It is a way of learning and giving back as we move.

The next stages include hardware, autonomous systems, and even software. What that will look like even we aren't sure at this time, but it will be kept up with the evolutionary state of the artificial intelligence industry.

The name
תְּבוּנָה

Tevunah is Hebrew for a deep form of insight and understanding — the ability to assimilate ideas into one's existence and make use of them throughout life. Taking the chaos associated with the life of a human and turning it into an efficient way to navigate life in an elevated manner.

Open by default

Our work lives in the open. Models, weights, and notes are published for anyone to inspect and build on.

Tevunah.Ai on Hugging Face ↗

תְּבוּנָה TEVUNAH.AI
Chat Mission Services Hugging Face ↗ About Contact
MISSION

Weaving the complicated parts of life into a coherent, efficient understanding of the world.

The goal is to be able to take the complicated parts of life and weave together a coherent and complete understanding of the world around us that allows life to be efficient in every aspect of life.

This can be applied to every area of life. Artificial intelligence is just that. It has arrived in the modern day as a thread that can be used to weave together multiple areas of thought that allow new and innovative ideas and ways of life to come about.

Our goal is simple. In every application of artificial intelligence — whether it be hardware, software, autonomous systems, and etc. — that we have utilized every part of artificial intelligence in the most efficient way possible, but at the same time maintaining the true power that comes along with it. Short cuts will not be found here.

This can be found in the Ultra Quantized models on Hugging Face. The goal was to be able to intelligently cut down the model size that would allow the user to still be able to have a high quality model that produces quality output, but at the same time the size was dramatically reduced. Through this, exposure was allowed. This opened up the door to individuals running consumer hardware to be able to experience higher quality models with limited deterioration.

Ultra Quantization — Hybrid Model collection ↗

We don't know where the world or the industry is going, but we will be there with the intent of innovation and efficiency.

Chat Mission Services Hugging Face ↗ About Contact
SERVICES

Hardware, software, and a fully in-house local AI.

We help you run AI entirely on your own infrastructure — no per-token bills, no third-party data exposure.

Hardware
  • Server builds, server racks, and GPU installation
Software
  • Local large language models — general purpose or specialized (vision, medicine)
  • User accounts, website, and chat interface, all self-hosted
Why it matters
  • Competitive with Claude/Gemini-tier models, but you only pay for hardware and your own connection
  • More secure, and cheaper at scale for AI-heavy teams
Cost
  • No markup on hardware — you pay the same price as the retailer it's purchased from
  • The only thing you pay for is labor, determined based on the job

Currently offered only in the Bismarck and Mandan area of North Dakota. If you're interested, see our Contact page.

Coming soon

We will eventually be able to train large language models on your own data so the model is more tailored to your own needs. This will increase security and accuracy of the models.
